title: Test Layers, Service Containers, Coverage, and Changed-Case Evidence · Spiral Delivery Review
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs test layers, service containers, coverage, and changed-case evidence from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the layered test and service evidence plan under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for layered test and service evidence plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost.
Configure service image identity, ports, health, credentials, network scope, per-job state, migrations, fixtures, and deterministic teardown.
Shard tests without duplicate or missing cases and detect order, time, locale, seed, port, and shared-state dependence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:
